report.summary: v11 community cycle: Drafted 4 new tweets (whale divergence 5-part thread, MiCA EU regulation teaser, DVT staking teaser, Monday evening recap) + Discord/TG evening update + newsletter v6 addendum for MiCA/DVT guides. Created Whale Divergence social card (1200x630 SVG with fear-vs-accumulation split-panel data visualization). Content calendar v8 now has 15+ posts scheduled Mon-Sun. All links deployment-safe.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Thread (5-part): Whale vs Retail Divergence — 270K BTC accumulation vs F&G 10, historical 150-400% rally pattern, links to /tools/whale-tracker + /tools/fear-greed-timeline (LIVE) — schedule Mon PM/evening
Tweet: MiCA EU Regulation Teaser — 14 authorized exchanges, USDT delisted, CASP July 2026 deadline, 'coming soon' framing (deploy-dependent) — schedule Tue AM
Tweet: DVT Staking Innovation Teaser — SSV 1.1M+ ETH, Obol 258K ETH, Vitalik native DVT proposal, 'coming soon' framing (deploy-dependent) — schedule Tue PM
Tweet: Monday Evening Recap — MiCA + DVT guides shipped today, 444 pages built, building through the bear — schedule Mon evening
Discord/TG: Monday Evening Update — content shipped today, newsletter preview, tomorrow's schedule, tool links
Newsletter v6 addendum: MiCA + DVT guide entries for DEEP DIVES section (deploy-dependent)

CARRIED FROM v10: All 13 previous posts (Fed fallout, 422 milestone, DCA dip, CLARITY Act update, whale accumulation, DeFi education, vault strategies, midweek data, engagement poll, CLARITY thread, Discord updates, newsletter v6)

sections.title: Social Visual Cards Created
items: Whale Divergence Thread card (1200x630 SVG) — Split-panel fear vs accumulation data viz: Left panel shows F&G 10 with red gauge + $100B wipeout + RSI 27; Right panel shows 270K BTC with green gauge + $23B value + 6yr low exchange supply. VS divider, historical 150-400% rally callout, dark glass-morphism, indigo→cyan→amber accent gradient, BTC price tag
